agenda.title: Make Agency Layer substrate real
agenda.reason: Anchors, agenda, and scratch space need to be durable enough that a Builder mind still exists after compaction and restart.

agenda.title: Enforce runtime truth before denial
agenda.reason: Capability lookup needs to stay mechanical, not optional, or the old failure mode will come back.

agenda.title: Preserve sharp judgment before social formatting
agenda.reason: The system needs a place where the read exists before it is optimized for reception.
